title: Traders Bet Warsh's Fed Will Hike Rates by December
title_cn: 交易员押注沃什领导的美联储将在 12 月前加息
summary:
Bond traders are fully pricing in an interest-rate hike by the Federal Reserve this year, a sign of conviction in the market that incoming Chair Kevin Warsh will need to move quickly to combat inflation.

Traders boosted their bets for higher rates on Friday after Fed Governor Christopher Waller said he supports making clear the central bank’s next interest-rate move is just as likely to be an increase as a cut. Interest-rate swaps imply that the market sees the Fed’s benchmark rate at least 25 basis points higher by the end of 2026.

It’s a complete turnaround from earlier this year, when President Trump’s selection of Warsh to lead the Fed inspired Wall Street to bet on several rate reductions in 2026. Traders quickly re-calibrated those wagers after the US and Israel attacked Iran in late February. For more on the inflation outlook, we speak with Kathy Bostjancic, Senior Vice President & Chief Economist at Nationwide. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bone Health in Women

summary: Dr. Doug Lucas, Orthopedic Surgeon; Clinical Lead, Bone Health & Longevity at LifeMD says osteoporosis affects millions of women, yet bone health still feels under-discussed. He adds that osteoporosis can be easily prevented with things like healthy protein forward diet, exercise, and supplements, much earlier in life. Dr. Lucas says those are the keys to bone health and longevity. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Estee Lauder and IMAX Higher; Ross Stores Boost Forecast | Stock Movers
title_cn: 雅诗兰黛和 IMAX High；罗斯商店提振预测|库存搬运工
summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers with Alexis Christoforous:

- Estee Lauder (EL) share are climbing following collapse of a proposed combination with Puig Brands that would have created one of the world’s largest fragrance and skincare companies. 

- IMAX Corp. (IMAX) shares jumped after the Wall Street Journal reported the large-screen theater company is exploring a sale and has approached entertainment companies as potential buyers.

- Ross Stores (ROST) shares are up after the off-price retailer boosted its comparable sales forecast for the full year. The firm also posted better-than-expected sales for the first quarter. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gold Drops as Fed’s Waller Says Next Move Likely to be Rate Hike

title_cn: 交易员押注沃什领导下的美联储将在 12 月前加息
summary: Bond traders are fully pricing in an interest-rate hike by the Federal Reserve this year, a sign of conviction in the market that incoming Chair Kevin Warsh will need to move quickly to combat inflation.

title: Fahmi Quadir on How to Survive as a Short-Seller
title_cn: 法赫米·夸迪尔 (Fahmi Quadir) 谈做空者如何生存
summary: A short seller is a gumshoe who roots out a particular story about a specific company and brings it to light. And Fahmi Quadir, the founder and CIO of Safkhet Capital, has been labeled "The Assassin" for being one of the most famous, successfully betting against companies like Wirecard and Valeant. In today's conversation with Quadir, recorded at our live show in London at Wilton's Music Hall, she dishes on what life is like for a short seller and why betting against stocks has been getting harder even during what she calls a "golden age of fraud." She also reveals that she's going long for the first time ever by investing strategically in one of the world's best-performing markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Chrysler Reverses Luxury Strategy, Turns to $30k Models

title: Fahmi Quadir on Why She’s Going Long on Korea

summary:
Founder and CIO of Safkhet Capital, Fahmi Quadir, earned the nickname "the Assassin" by short-selling Wirecard AG and Valeant.

On this episode of the Odd Lots podcast, Quadir tells Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway  about her role in the current "golden age of fraud" and why, for the first time ever, she is going long with a focus on Korea that has nothing to do with the AI boom.  (Source: Bloomberg)

(Source: Bloomberg)

title: Why Did Sustainable Fashion Brand Everlane Sell to Shein?
title_cn: 为什么可持续时尚品牌 Everlane 出售给 Shein？
summary:
Chinese fast-fashion brand Shein is known for churning out thousands of youth-friendly styles daily at low prices. Over the past few years, the e-commerce giant has been scrutinized for its environmental impact, as well as its production practices. So why is Shein buying sustainable fashion retailer Everlane, known for its “radical transparency?"

Lauren Sherman, fashion correspondent at Puck, joins Stacey Vanek Smith and Max Chafkin to unpack the story behind the acquisition. (Source: Bloomberg)

Martin says it's been a good year for IPOs across all industries and they're working to bring more companies public. She speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: Such services pose an existential threat to traditional entertainment.

title_cn: Zara 所有者 Inditex 首席执行官押注多元化和人工智能促进增长
summary: Zara owner Inditex SA is banking on diversification across brands and countries as well as artificial intelligence to spur growth at the world’s largest listed retailer, Chief Executive Officer Óscar García Maceiras said.

title: DeepSeek Founder Avows AGI Goal Ahead of $10 Billion Funding
title_cn: DeepSeek 创始人在融资 100 亿美元之前宣布 AGI 目标
summary: DeepSeek’s senior management has told potential investors in its ongoing 70 billion yuan ($10 billion) funding round that the startup will prioritize groundbreaking AI research over short-term commercialization, people familiar with the matter said.

title: Samsung Chip Workers Face Colleagues’ Resentment Over Bonus Deal
title_cn: 三星芯片工人面临同事对奖金交易的不满
summary: Samsung Electronics Co. staved off a potentially catastrophic strike this week, reaching a tentative deal with leaders of its largest union at the last minute to share more profits from the AI boom. But inside the $1.1 trillion technology behemoth, not everyone is happy.

title: BlackRock's Li Sees Earnings Momentum Driven by AI
title_cn: 贝莱德李嘉诚认为人工智能将推动盈利增长
summary: BlackRock Chief Investment Strategist Wei Li says artificial intelligence is driving a lot of the major earnings upgrades in equity markets. "We can look at AI lifting the whole market, but identifying where the bottlenecks are is a good active play," Li tells Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Salesforce Touts AI Promise Over Reality in SaaSpocalypse Fight
title_cn: Salesforce 在 SaaS 末日之战中宣扬人工智能的承诺而非现实

title: Randstad CEO on AI & Future of Work
title_cn: 任仕达首席执行官谈人工智能和未来工作
summary:
Sander van ’t Noordende, CEO of recruitment giant Randstad, says their base case is that 7-8% of jobs will be replaced by artificial intelligence over the next 5 to 10 years. However, Van ‘t Noordende says he does not see the "doomsday scenario" that some predict.

In an interview on "The Pulse with Francine Lacqua" on May 21, van ‘t Noordende said AI will be a "wave" over the next decade, but also presents many opportunities, enabling many workers to be more productive, and requires massive infrastructure. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: StanChart CEO Apologizes for ‘Lower-Value Human’ Comments
title_cn: 渣打银行首席执行官为“低价值人类”言论道歉
summary: Standard Chartered Plc Chief Executive Officer Bill Winters apologized for his comments earlier this week about how artificial intelligence will affect “lower-value human capital,” after such remarks spurred public backlash.

title: EU-Anthropic Talks Over Mythos Concerns Are Stalled, Spain Says
title_cn: 西班牙表示，欧盟与人类关于神话问题的谈判陷入僵局
summary: The European Union has made little progress in talks with Anthropic PBC to get its banks and companies tested for digital vulnerabilities that the new Mythos AI model uncovers, Spain’s economy minister said.

title: Polymarket Is Said to Seek Japan Prediction Market Approval
title_cn: 据称 Polymarket 正在寻求日本预测市场的批准
summary: Polymarket has appointed a representative in Japan and is preparing to lobby for the authorization of prediction markets in the country, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Chinese Brands Snap Up Record 15% of Europe’s Electric-Car Sales
title_cn: 中国品牌抢占欧洲电动汽车销量 15% 创历史新高
summary: Chinese automakers accounted for more than 15% of electric-vehicle sales in Europe for the first time last month as consumer appetite for models from the country shows no sign of slowing.

title: Kawasaki Heavy Shares Rally on AI Tie-Up Plan With Nvidia
title_cn: 川崎重工因与 Nvidia 的人工智能合作计划而股价上涨
summary: Kawasaki Heavy Industries Ltd. shares rallied as much as 12%, the most since February, on the company’s plan to collaborate with US tech company Nvidia Corp. and others on physical AI robot technology.

title: Vuchot on Why Luxury Travel Is Resilient in Asia
title_cn: Vuchot 谈为何豪华旅游在亚洲具有弹性
summary:
Luxury hospitality is proving resilient despite geopolitical risk, fuel shortages and market volatility. This segment examines how travel demand is shifting within Asia, with domestic and regional travel supporting occupancy and pricing.
Benjamin Vuchot, CEO of The Hongkong and Shanghai Hotels, speaks with Haslinda Amin from the JPMorgan Global China Summit in Shanghai to discuss demand trends, operational challenges and the group’s strategic priorities. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Insilico on Applying AI to Transform Drug Discovery
title_cn: Insilico 致力于应用人工智能变革药物发现
summary: Insilico Medicine Founder & CEO Alex Zhavoronkov discusses how his company aims to apply artificial intelligence to revolutionize drug discovery and longevity research. He speaks with Haslinda Amin from the sidelines of 'JPMorgan Global China Summit' in Shanghai. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Capex Drives Memory Demand and Asia Tech Outlook
title_cn: 人工智能资本支出推动内存需求和亚洲科技前景
summary: Rising investment in artificial intelligence is reshaping demand for semiconductors, with memory, CPUs and GPUs all seeing sustained growth. This segment examines how AI-driven capex is supporting companies across Asia’s tech supply chain. Jonathan Curtis, Portfolio Manager at Franklin Templeton, speaks with Haslinda Amin from the JPMorgan Global China Summit in Shanghai to share his outlook on AI, memory markets and global equities. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Lenovo Surges to 26-Year High After Strong AI Growth | The China Show 5/22/2026
title_cn: 人工智能强劲增长后，联想股价飙升至 26 年来新高 |中国展 2026 年 5 月 22 日
summary: “Bloomberg: The China Show” is your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy. From politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and David Ingles give global investors unique insight, delivering in-depth discussions with the newsmakers who matter. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Investors Look Beyond TSMC as AI Boom Spreads to New Winners
title_cn: 随着人工智能热潮蔓延至新的赢家，投资者将目光投向台积电之外
summary: After several years flying high as Asia’s best Nvidia Corp. proxy, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. is increasingly vying with other artificial intelligence stocks for investor attention.

title: Lenovo Shares Near All-Time High After Strong AI Growth
title_cn: 人工智能强劲增长后，联想股价接近历史新高
summary: Lenovo Group Ltd. shares were on track to close at their highest on Friday after the company reported strong growth in AI-related earnings that offset difficulties from rising component prices.

title: Putin Vows Response After Saying Six Died in College Strike
title_cn: 普京称大学罢工造成六人死亡后誓言做出回应
summary: President Vladimir Putin ordered defense officials to prepare what he said were options for retaliation after he accused Ukraine of attacking a college in the Russian-occupied Luhansk region, killing at least six people.

title: South Africa President to Appeal Against Farm Cash Report Monday
title_cn: 南非总统周一对农业现金报告提出上诉
summary: South African President Cyril Ramaphosa’s legal team plans to file court papers early next week seeking a review of an independent panel’s report that found he may have breached the constitution in his handling of a burglary at his game farm.

title: Trump Gets Another Ally in EU With Jansa’s Return in Slovenia
title_cn: 随着扬萨重返斯洛文尼亚，特朗普在欧盟获得了另一个盟友
summary: Slovenian lawmakers elected nationalist leader Janez Jansa as the country’s next premier, tilting another European Union member to the right and handing Donald Trump a potential ally in the bloc.

title: UK’s FCA Weighs Compulsory Disclosure for Private Credit Firms
title_cn: 英国 FCA 考虑对私人信贷公司实施强制披露
summary: The Financial Conduct Authority is considering implementing a quarterly disclosure regime for private credit firms operating in the UK, requiring them to disclose portfolios, valuations and terms.

title: EU Warns Companies to Diversify Supply Lines From China Faster
title_cn: 欧盟警告企业加快中国供应链多元化
summary: The European Union’s industry chief said that businesses on the continent haven’t done enough to reduce major dependencies on China.

title: Fed's Waller Now Says Rate Increases Are Possible
title_cn: 美联储沃勒现在表示有可能加息
summary: Federal Reserve Governor Christopher Waller now says he can't rule out voting to raise interest rates if inflation doesn’t start to slow soon, saying “inflation is not headed in the right direction." Waller made the comments during a speech in Germany. Bloomberg's Michael McKee reports.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK Military Air Show Canceled Over Middle East War Uncertainty
title_cn: 英国军事航空展因中东战争不确定性而取消
summary: The Royal International Air Tattoo at RAF Fairford, the UK’s biggest military air show, has been canceled this summer because US aircraft are using the venue for missions related to the Iran war, which continues to have wide-ranging impacts.

title: Turkey’s London Investor Pitch Gets Upended by Markets Tailspin
title_cn: 土耳其在伦敦的投资者宣传因市场失控而被颠覆
summary: With a packed schedule of meetings and speeches in front of London investors, Turkey’s top economic officials set out on Thursday to ease concerns about the country’s accelerating pace of inflation.

title: NATO Welcomes Trump Troop Pledge as Allies Caught Off Guard
title_cn: 北约欢迎特朗普的增兵承诺，盟友措手不及
summary: NATO welcomed an abrupt announcement by President Donald Trump to send an additional 5,000 troops to Poland even as the alliance’s top envoys braced for cuts in US military resources.

title: Top Pakistan Mediator Heads to Iran in Hint at US Deal Progress
title_cn: 巴基斯坦高级调解员前往伊朗暗示美国协议取得进展
summary: Pakistan said its army chief, the favored interlocutor between Washington and Tehran, is headed to the Iranian capital, signaling progress has been made in talks to end the war.

title: UAE Joins Saudis, Qatar in Urging Trump Not to Restart War
title_cn: 阿联酋与沙特、卡塔尔一起敦促特朗普不要重启战争
summary: The United Arab Emirates has made a more concerted push for an end to the Iran war in recent days, joining Saudi Arabia and Qatar in urging US President Donald Trump to give negotiations a chance, according to several people familiar with the matter.

title: Kenyan Premier Warns of Tougher Economic Times Ahead on Iran War
title_cn: 肯尼亚总理警告伊朗战争将导致经济形势更加严峻
summary: Kenyans should brace themselves for tougher economic times ahead because of the fallout from the Iran war, Prime Cabinet Secretary Musalia Mudavadi said.

title: Ukraine, Allies Grow Confident Russia Invasion Losing Steam
title_cn: 乌克兰及其盟国越来越相信俄罗斯的入侵正在失去动力
summary: Ukraine and its allies are increasingly confident that Russia’s invasion is running out of steam as Kyiv stabilizes the front line and stalls a spring offensive by Moscow.

title: Switzerland Adopts Most of EU’s New Russia Sanctions Package
title_cn: 瑞士采纳欧盟新俄罗斯制裁方案的大部分内容
summary: Switzerland is adopting most of the European Union’s 20th sanctions package against Russia and Belarus, but skips from some elements for now, the government said.

title: The 77,000 Voters Set to Decide the Next UK Prime Minister
title_cn: 77,000 名选民将决定下一任英国首相
summary: The Makerfield by-election is a high stakes gamble by Andy Burnham to wrestle power from Keir Starmer.

title: EU Reviewing Italy’s Call to Ease Fiscal Rules as Costs Rise
title_cn: 欧盟正在审查意大利因成本上升而放松财政规则的呼吁
summary: The European Union is considering Italy’s plea to get more leeway on the bloc’s fiscal rules as the Iran war raises costs for households and businesses.

title: NATO-Russia War Simulation Shows Risk of UK Defense Spending Gap
title_cn: 北约-俄罗斯战争模拟显示英国国防支出缺口的风险
summary: Huddled on a disused underground train platform in central London, hundreds of British soldiers played out their response to a fictional Russian attack on NATO, chewing through terabytes of data every day to direct fictional assets, including drones and robots, against the invasion.

title: The Key Sticking Points for a US-Iran Peace Deal
title_cn: 美伊和平协议的关键症结
summary: The US and Iran have been locked in a stalemate since agreeing to a ceasefire in April. They’ve been unable to reach a deal to end a monthslong war that has killed thousands of people and sparked a global energy crunch.

title: Costs Rise and Political Fallout Deepens Over Iran Stalemate
title_cn: 伊朗僵局导致成本上升和政治影响加深
summary: A month after an indefinite ceasefire, the endgame remains elusive

title: Italy Set to Prolong Fuel Aid Even as Iran War Weighs on Economy
title_cn: 尽管伊朗战争给经济带来压力，意大利仍将延长燃料援助
summary: Italy is set to extend its energy relief measures, with Industry Minister Adolfo Urso saying the support would remain in place as long as the Iran war pushes up fuel and energy prices for households and businesses.

title: Britain’s Economy Turns Sour Just as Starmer Had a Reason to Brag
title_cn: 英国经济恶化，斯塔默有理由吹嘘
summary: A smile on his face, Keir Starmer approached reporters outside Downing Street on Thursday to talk up recent data that suggested that Britain was the fastest growing economy in the Group of Seven.

title: Warsh to Be Sworn In as Fed Chief During White House Ceremony
title_cn: 沃什将在白宫仪式上宣誓就任美联储主席
summary: Kevin Warsh, who’s promised the biggest shakeup in decades at the US central bank, is set to be sworn into office Friday in a White House ceremony as the 17th chair of the Federal Reserve.

title: Burnham Vows to Change UK Economy in Official Campaign Launch
title_cn: 伯纳姆誓言在官方活动启动中改变英国经济
summary: Andy Burnham, the would-be successor to Keir Starmer as prime minister, pledged to change Britain’s economy as he launched a special election campaign that could clear his path to 10 Downing Street.

title: Kosovo Approves Cash Handouts 16 Days Ahead of Snap Elections
title_cn: 科索沃在提前选举前 16 天批准现金发放
summary: Kosovo’s government approved cash handouts and higher maternity benefits 16 days before snap elections in which Prime Minister Albin Kurti is seeking re-election after months of political deadlock.

title: Trump Should Revive This Hall Of Fame
title_cn: 特朗普应该重振这座名人堂
summary: Trump wants to build the National Garden of Heroes, but he should instead look to the first Hall of Fame hidden on the beautiful campus of Bronx Community College, says Bloomberg Opinion columnist Frank Barry. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bolivia’s New President Is In Trouble After Just Six Months
title_cn: 玻利维亚新总统上任仅六个月就陷入麻烦
summary: Rodrigo Paz was elected with broad support to tackle an economic crisis. Now many just want him to go.

title: ECB Chief Says Inflation Expectations Remain On Target
title_cn: 欧洲央行行长表示通胀预期仍处于目标范围内
summary: European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde stressed that long-term inflation expectations are still broadly in line with the 2% target, despite deepening fallout from the Iran war.

title: Why Prabowo’s Commodity Export Controls Are Spooking Indonesian Markets
title_cn: 为什么普拉博沃的商品出口管制令印尼市场感到不安
summary: Indonesia’s President Prabowo Subianto has been undertaking an ambitious agenda to try to remake Southeast Asia’s biggest economy. The centerpiece is an effort to lift annual growth to 8%, up from an average of roughly 5% over the past decade.

title: UBS Hits Back Over Nazi-Accounts Probe Amid Senate Pressure
title_cn: 瑞银在参议院压力下反击纳粹账户调查
summary: UBS Group AG accused the US lawyer overseeing a six-year-old inquiry into Credit Suisse’s handling of Nazi-linked accounts of bias and exceeding his mandate, deepening a standoff between the Swiss bank and its critics in Washington.
